untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) climactic exhaustion identification with volume spike on 'shorter timeframe' — no multi-timeframe indicator available; (2) two-legged consolidation pattern — no consolidation range or pattern detection indicator available; (3) consolidation duration and breakout confirmation thresholds marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] — specific parameters undefined. The signal is qualitative (pattern-based) and requires dynamic consolidation range detection and multi-timeframe analysis not supported by the available indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: volume spike (volume > hvol_20) + volatility expansion (atr_14 > atr_7) as exhaustion markers; pivot levels (s1/r1) as consolidation boundaries. However, this does not capture the core logic of the signal: identifying two-legged consolidation after a climax, and confirming breakout in the original trend direction. A proper implementation would require: (a) consolidation detection logic, (b) multi-timeframe indicators, (c) trend direction memory/context, and (d) specific bar-count thresholds for consolidation_duration_bars_min and confirmation_bars_after_breakout.
